title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend)
score_reasoning: This is an exceptionally strong match for your profile. Your 7 years of Python backend engineering, microservices architecture, and PostgreSQL expertise directly align with Launchpad's mature Python-driven system. The role explicitly values API-first design, comprehensive testing (your 85% test coverage aligns perfectly), and mentoring—all evident strengths in your CV. The EMEA-remote setup, senior-level responsibilities with architecture influence, and focus on maintaining and improving large-scale web applications are precisely aligned with your stated career direction. Canonical's open-source culture and scale-up environment fit your industry preferences. The role's emphasis on system reliability and continuous improvement resonates with your OpenTelemetry and migration work at Velox. Minor note: the Debian/Ubuntu packaging knowledge is nice-to-have rather than core, and you'll learn it in context. This represents your core backend architect trajectory at the right seniority level.
